title: Ace’s Fate and the End of the War: Rising Conflict
description: In the Marineford War storyline, this section centers on Unknown person #11, Blackbeard, Luffy, Unknown person #9, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4 as the scene develops across pages 5–8.
scene: This scene advances the Marineford War conflict through Unknown person #11, Blackbeard, Luffy, Unknown person #9, Unknown person #3, focusing on the immediate stakes of ace’s fate and the end of the war: rising conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: We're completely cut off from the boss!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: The Plaza has been split in two!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: The Pirates are on the other side!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: With half of your face gone,

dialogue.speaker: Blackbeard
dialogue.text: Do your weeping on the ship!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: There's something next to the headquer- TERS!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ....!!! you're....!!! How did you get here!!?

summary: This scene advances the Marineford War conflict through Unknown person #11, Blackbeard, Luffy, Unknown person #9, Unknown person #3, focusing on the immediate stakes of ace’s fate and the end of the war: rising conflict.
